text: Home | Institute for Healthcare Improvement Driving Health Care Forward Through Transformational Improvement Science IHI applies the science of improvement to empower safer, resilient, more equitable care systems. Discover what we can do for you. IHI delivers measurable results and proven impact, worldwide. Advancing Health Care Improvement, Together Learn with IHI. Build competencies. Earn CEUs.

Grow leadership skills. Achieve professional certification. Flexible programs, for individuals and teams, available online, on demand, and in-person. Connect with IHI. Convene with purpose. Exchange insights. Get inspired. Collaborate with us to accelerate change, drive innovation, and form global alliances to improve health and health care for everyone. Partner with IHI.

Turn purpose into progress. Scale measurable results across your organization through strategic, advisory services that help you create a culture of safety and an efficient system dedicated to continuous improvement on all levels.
